message.content:
@startuml
actor User

participant "UpdateUserServlet" as Servlet
participant "userDto:UserDto" as UserDto
participant "userDao:UserDao" as UserDao
participant "users" as users

User -> Servlet : 
activate Servlet

Servlet -> UserDto : 生成
activate UserDto

Servlet -> UserDto : setId(id)
Servlet -> UserDto : setUserId(user_id)
Servlet -> UserDto : setUserPass(User_password)
Servlet -> UserDto : setUserName(user_name)
Servlet -> UserDto : setAddress(address)
Servlet -> UserDto : setSubAddress(address_sub)
Servlet -> UserDto : setTel(tel)
Servlet -> UserDto : setGender(gender)

Servlet -> UserDao : 生成
activate UserDao

Servlet -> UserDao : updateUser(userDto)

UserDao -> users : UPDATE文実行
activate users

users --> UserDao : true/false
deactivate users

UserDao --> Servlet : true/false
deactivate UserDao
deactivate UserDto
deactivate Servlet

@enduml
